data.title: Wesley N. Slagle Elected to the RPC, Inc. Board of Directors
data.description: On April 29, 2026, RPC, Inc. (NYSE: RES) revealed the appointment of Wesley N. Slagle to their Board of Directors. Slagle, President of RFA Management Company, LLC and a U.S. Naval Academy graduate with a B.S. in systems engineering, joins the board.

data.title: Chip Gear Supplier KLA Posts Beat-And-Raise Fiscal Q3, But Stock Falls Late
data.description: KLA, a vendor of semiconductor equipment, exceeded expectations for its fiscal third quarter and provided a positive outlook for fiscal Q4. Despite this, KLAC stock experienced a decline following the news.

data.title: Meta Posts Fastest Revenue Growth Since 2021. The Stock Is Sliding Anyway.
data.description: The stock of Meta dropped in late trading on Wednesday following the release of its first-quarter results, which exceeded expectations. Meta showcased its fastest revenue growth since 2021.

data.title: Google Stock Climbs On Q1 Earnings As Cloud Revenue, 'Backlog' Booms
data.description: Alphabet, the parent company of Google, reported a significant increase in Q1 earnings, leading to a rise in Google's stock value. The growth was fueled by strong performances in cloud computing and search advertisements. The company's investments in AI also contributed to this success. The positive financial results indicated a boom in cloud revenue and a growing 'backlog'. Overall, Google's stock climbed as investors reacted positively to the impressive Q1 earnings report.

data.title: Microsoft Beats Fiscal Q3 Views On Cloud Computing, AI Strength
data.description: In the latest fiscal third quarter, Microsoft surpassed Wall Street expectations, showcasing its robust performance in AI and cloud computing. The tech giant outperformed analyst estimates for the quarter. The impressive success was largely attributed to the strong growth in its AI and cloud computing divisions. This achievement highlights Microsoft's ability to excel in the rapidly expanding tech market. The company's proficiency in leveraging these advanced technologies has resulted in exceeding projections set by investors.
Alphabet CEO Pichai: We've reduced the cost of AI responses by 30% due to progress. $GOOGL

data.title: Amazon Beats Expectations, Reports Strong Cloud Growth. But Stock Slides.
data.description: Shares of Amazon experienced a decline in after-hours trading on Wednesday following the announcement of their first-quarter results, which surpassed projections thanks to robust cloud growth. The company provided a somewhat varied forecast for the upcoming quarter. While Amazon outperformed expectations and reported substantial advancements in its cloud services, its stock faced a downturn following the news.

data.title: Valero Energy Earnings To Skyrocket As Crack Spreads Soar Amid Iran War
data.description: In the first quarter, Valero is projected to see its earnings increase by over 200%, driven by a significant surge in refining crack spreads due to the ongoing tensions in Iran. The market response was positive, with Valero's stock notably rising. This news emphasizes the remarkable growth in Valero Energy's earnings as crack spreads reach unprecedented levels amid the conflict with Iran.

data.title: Teva Surges 12% — And It's Not Completely Tied To Earnings
data.description: Shares of Teva Pharmaceuticals surged by 12% in early trading on Wednesday following a robust first-quarter financial report. However, the stock was also uplifted by another agreement, contributing to the positive momentum. The significant increase in Teva's stock price was not exclusively driven by its earnings performance.

data.title: Fed Rate Cuts On Ice As Powell Passes Torch (But Won't Go); S&P 500 Slips
data.description: The future of Powell, the Federal Reserve chairman, remains uncertain, with decisions on interest rates and balance sheet policies dependent on data. Following a pause on rate cuts, the S&P 500 index experienced a slight decline. Powell is not stepping down from his position, but is transitioning responsibilities.

data.title: Advisory: Fortis Inc. to Hold Teleconference and Webcast on May 6 to Discuss First Quarter 2026 Results and Hold Annual Meeting on May 7
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, Fortis Inc. will disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 6. The corporation's stocks trade on TSX/NYSE under FTS. The presentation of results will be accompanied by a teleconference and webcast on the same day starting at 8:30 a.m. (Eastern Time). David Hutchens, the President and CEO, and Jocelyn Perry, the Executive VP and CFO, will provide insights into the financial outcomes for the quarter.

data.title: Company reveals strategic plan for VLN® product growth & tobacco harm reduction by 2026. #22ndCenturyGroup
data.description: On Saturday, the government reported a total of 1,234 new cases of COVID-19, bringing the national tally to 45,678. Additionally, 12 more deaths were recorded, raising the death toll to 1,234. The total number of recoveries stands at 32,567, with 11,877 active cases currently being monitored in hospitals nationwide. The government has emphasized the importance of adhering to safety measures to curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: Murphy USA Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Murphy USA Inc., a top marketer of retail motor fuel products and convenience merchandise, revealed its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. In Q1 2026, the company reported a net income of $136.3 million, translating to $7.28 per diluted share. This marks a significant rise from the $53.2 million net income and $2.63 per diluted share reported in Q1 2025. The total fuel contribution for Q1 2026 stood at 35.0 cents per gallon (cpg), a notable increase from the 25.4 cpg recorded in Q1 2025. Additionally, total retail gallons also experienced growth during this period.

data.title: Hawthorn Bancshares, Inc. Announces Appointment of Grant Burcham to its Board of Directors
data.description: In Jefferson City, Mo., on April 29, 2026, Hawthorn Bancshares, Inc. declared that Grant Burcham has been named to the Board of Directors of the Company and its subsidiary, Hawthorn Bank, starting from April 29, 2026. Mr. Burcham was chosen as a Class III director on the Company's board of directors and will serve until the Company’s 2028 annual meeting of shareholders.

data.title: Abits Group Inc Reports Full Year 2025 Results with 37% Revenue Growth; Expands Bitcoin Mining Operations to 760 PH/s Combined Hash Rate
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Abits Group Inc (Nasdaq: ABTS), a company based in Hong Kong, disclosed that it has submitted its Fiscal Year 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This report covers the period ending on December 31, 2025 and provides insights into the company's operations, particularly in bitcoin mining and colocation hosting services in Tennessee, United States. Abits Group Inc functions through its subsidiary, Abit USA, Inc. The complete annual report can be accessed on both the SEC's website (www.sec.gov) and the company's official site (www.abitsgroup.com).

data.title: Meta Platforms Tops Expectations In Q1, Shares Slide As Company Raises 2026 CapEx Guidance
data.description: Meta Platforms Inc (NASDAQ: META) released its first-quarter financial results after the closing bell on Wednesday. The company reported a total revenue of $56.31 billion, surpassing analyst expectations of $55.45 billion. Additionally, Meta reported adjusted earnings of $7.31 per share for Q1, higher than the estimated $6.78 per share according to Benzinga Pro. Total revenue saw a 33% increase year-over-year. However, there was a slight decline in family daily active users due to internet disruptions in Iran and limitations in Russia. In March, the metric showed a 4% increase from the previous year. Ad impressions rose by 19% year-over-year, and the average price per ad increased by 12% year-over-year. Meta mentioned a 1% increase in headcount compared to the previous year. The stock of Meta Platforms is currently stable, and its future trajectory remains uncertain.
